source.licenseNotes: Replace with a known-good capture that has documented commercial compatibility before using as Phase 1 evidence.

Candidate for technical pipeline validation only. Pexels marks the page Free to use and No People; current Pexels license/terms allow free commercial and non-commercial use with restrictions on standalone resale, endorsement, stock redistribution and marks. Avoid commercial showcase use without review. Prefer self-captured footage for production evidence.

capture.subject: empty cafe interior
capture.motion: room-scale camera move candidate; verify parallax and blur before SfM
capture.expectedResolution: 4K or HD download, exact file chosen manually

source.licenseNotes: Preferred technical reference candidate because it comes from the Nerfstudio real-world neural-rendering dataset, not a generic stock clip. The Nerfstudio paper says the associated code and data are publicly available with open-source licensing, and the repository license is Apache-2.0, but the exact downloaded dataset archive must still be retained and reviewed before commercial demo use. Use this for local technical validation only until that evidence is attached.

dataset.videoDerivation: Create data/videos/nerfstudio-dozer-reference.mp4 from the downloaded image sequence only as a compatibility layer for the current video-first pipeline. Keep the original images and transforms/COLMAP data as source evidence.

capture.subject: outdoor real-world dozer scene from a neural-rendering dataset
capture.motion: multi-view capture with strong parallax; derive a slow reference video only after dataset download
capture.expectedResolution: dataset-provided images; derived video resolution TBD

source.licenseNotes: Fallback technical reference used when Nerfstudio Google Drive access is unavailable. The scene comes from the Mip-NeRF 360 extra scenes archive hosted by Google Research and is designed for 360-degree view synthesis. Use for local technical validation only until dataset license evidence is recorded.

dataset.videoDerivation: Create data/videos/mipnerf360-flowers-reference.mp4 from images_4 at 3 fps as a compatibility layer for the current video-first pipeline. Keep the original image sequence, sparse model and archive hash as source evidence.

capture.subject: outdoor flowers scene from a 360-degree neural-rendering benchmark dataset
capture.motion: ordered multi-view image sequence with strong parallax; derived as a slow 3 fps reference video
